description: Welcome to this beautifully updated townhome in the Bridlewoods! This 3 bedroom/ 3 bathroom 2-storey home is thoughtfully renovated with modern finishings. Enjoy the refreshed living space with New windows (2023), updated lighting and the popcorn ceiling smoothed for a clean look. Completely repainted and New laminate flooring throughout. The bathrooms have been tastefully upgraded including the main bath with new flooring, vanity & fully remodeled powder room. Other features include a gas fireplace, New hot water tank (2024), New kitchen faucet and single car garage w/ a 2nd parking spot out front. With an amazing central Walnut Grove location this one is a must see!
